info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

This module is responsible for the configuration of managed devices. FortiManager has multiple configuration sets:
  • Global (/pm/config/global/) scope is all ADOMs, and configurations are copied to ADOM during global package assignment.
  • ADOM (/pm/config/adom/) configurations are managed by packages and templates. Each template and package have their scope restricted to the a subset of the ADOM's devices that are assigned to the package, and configurations are copied down to device during install.
  • Device (/pm/config/device/global/, /pm/config/device/vdom/) scope is one device only.

Whenever configuration for Global or ADOM is modified, it will eventually be copied to Device config database after next installation. A few selected device-level objects are listed in this documentation. For other objects that are not supported by higher-level configuration sets, JSON requests to directly access and modify the configuration at the Device level can be done by a linear translation of FGT CLI object paths. Depending on OS version and platform type, the availability of objects and attributes will be different on different devices.

An example at the end of this section in documentation shows how FGT CLI translation works.

tags.name: /pm/config/_application/list
tags.description: Retrieve a list of application objects.

tags.name: /pm/config/_category/list
tags.description: Retrieve a list of FortiGuard category objects.

tags.name: /pm/config/_data/tablesize
tags.description: Get maximum tablesize of table categories.

tags.name: /pm/config/_data/tablesize/faz
tags.description: Get tablesize of FortiAnalyzer CLI categories.

tags.name: /pm/config/_data/tablesize/fmg
tags.description: Get tablesize of FortiManager CLI categories.

tags.name: /pm/config/_data/tablesize/fos
tags.description: Get tablesize of FortiOS CLI categories (adom values only).

tags.name: /pm/config/_package/status
tags.description: Get device package/template status, or global package assign status.  Optionally specify device and vdom name in the url to filter response by device.

tags.name: /pm/config/_reset/database
tags.description:
Reset Global ADOM to a specific version.

NOTE: This operation will erase all data in Global database!

tags.name: /pm/config/_rule/list
tags.description: Retrieve a list of rule objects.

tags.name: /pm/config/_upgrade
tags.description: Upgrade an ADOM to the next version.

tags.name: /pm/config/_workspace/lock
tags.description: Lock an ADOM in workspace mode.

tags.name: /pm/config/_workspace/unlock
tags.description: Unlock an ADOM. If this command is used before a commit, all changes will be discarded.

stype.description: Subtype for "template" package type. If not specified, status for all subtypes are fetched.

type.description: Package or template type. Assume "policy package" if not specified.

adom.description: Adom name for global assignment result.

dev.description: Device name for device package/template assignment result.

pkg.description: Package or template path and name.

status.description: Status string for the package or template assignment.

type.description: Package or template type. If attribute not returned in the response, the type would be "policy package".

vdom.description: Device vdom name for device package/template assignment result.
